title: The Magic Toy Shop Kids Nesting & Stacking Blocks - 10 Piece Montessori Educational Activity Set for Babies, Toddlers - 87cm Tall Tower Cubes with Numbers, Animals, Shapes & Storage Box
features: NUMBERS, ANIMALS & COLOURS: Make learning fun with this vibrant set of 10 stacking blocks. Each side features bright illustrations, including friendly zoo animals like elephants and tigers, alongside numbers 1-10 to introduce counting and colour recognition.
BUILD A GIANT TOWER: These graduated cubes stack on top of one another to build a tower up to 87cm tall, encouraging motor skills as children stretch to place the final block.

NESTING STORAGE DESIGN: When playtime is over, the clean-up is part of the fun. The cubes nest perfectly inside one another for compact storage. The set comes in a handy box with a carrying handle, making it a great travel toy or tidy gift solution.

EARLY DEVELOPMENT: An ideal Montessori toy, these blocks promote hand-eye coordination and spatial awareness. Handling, stacking, and knocking down the lightweight but sturdy cardboard cubes helps refine fine motor skills in a safe environment.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 14 cm, Depth: 14 cm, Height: 14 cm / Weight: 620 g / Package Dimensions: Height: 15 cm, Width: 15 cm, Depth: 15 cm / Package Weight: 620 g / Material: Cardboard / Color: Multicolour
description: Product Description Nesting & Stacking Blocks Set What’s the best part about building a nesting block tower? Knocking it all down, of course. Crash! Features 10 blocks plus the storage box with carrying handle. Nest the colorful blocks to compare sizes or build the tall tower of sturdy cardboard cubes right in your play room! Each side of these brightly colored stacking blocks present a color, a colorful animal, a number, or the colorful counting dots. Specification Dimensions: Blocks can be stacked up to 87 cm / 34 inches. Biggest box approx. 14 cm / 5.5 inches. Recommended age: 12 months + Stacking job for kids just got smarter! Now toddlers can stack cardboard blocks and learn animals, colors, and numbers! Recycled Paper Printed Our durable nesting and stacking blocks are a modern take on a classic developmental toy. Small hands can practice nesting the blocks inside each other in the right order, and balance them one atop the other to build a tower. Brightly colored illustrations encourage interaction and story-telling, and little ones can count each numbered block, 1 to 10.
